Experience with Getty platform or similar image distribution systems

dealbreakers: Role requires specialized experience in photo editing, digital/social media photography, and entertainment publicity, which the candidate lacks
No demonstrated experience in film, entertainment, or creative media industries
On-site requirement in Burbank, CA (candidate is based in Sweden with no indication of relocation willingness)
match.logistics_notes: Candidate is based in Sweden; role requires on-site presence in Burbank, CA with no remote option.
match.cultural_fit_summary: Candidate demonstrates strong collaboration, problem-solving, and interdisciplinary skills, but these are not aligned with the creative, editorial, and industry-specific demands of the role.
match.reasoning: The candidate's background in Python development, technical support, and academic coursework in computer science does not align with the core requirements of a Senior Publicist/Photo Editor role.
